input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.4.3
            TITLE: bolted electrical connections in the high current path of the tractive system must include a

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.4.3: Bolted electrical connections in the high current path of the Tractive System must include a
EV.6.4.3 Bolted electrical connections in the high current path of the Tractive System must include a 
positive locking feature to prevent unintentional loosening 
Lock washers or thread locking compounds (Loctite®) or adhesives are not acceptable.   
Bolts with nylon patches are allowed for blind connections into OEM components.

final_answer: Bolted electrical connections in the high current path of the Tractive System must include a positive locking feature to prevent unintentional loosening Lock washers or thread locking compounds (Loctite®) or adhesives are not acceptable. Bolts with nylon patches are allowed for blind connections into OEM components.
